## Security checklist

- [ ] I did not commit API keys, tokens, passwords, `.env` files, build artifacts, local settings, or user diagrams.
- [ ] I ran `npm run security:audit` before requesting review.
- [ ] I kept external navigation allowlisted in `main.js`.
- [ ] I did not expose provider API keys or sensitive settings to renderer storage.
- [ ] I reviewed dependency changes and avoided unnecessary new runtime packages.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual smoke test of affected GreyNet sections
